The `gate` job enforces the same three checks as `scripts/gate.sh` — `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test --workspace` — against the toolchain pinned in `rust-toolchain.toml` (1.96.0); all three must be green before a PR may merge. The `bench` job (`./target/release/lightr bench --check`) runs for visibility after gate passes, but bench budgets are calibrated to the founder Mac; GitHub-hosted runners are a different machine class, so a bench failure is investigated rather than treated as an automatic merge block.
